name: E-2 options schema: a rule with no options_schema and no profile options yields resolved_options={} (empty merge)
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-105
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-105: error
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-105 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -q 'resolved_options={}' err.txt && echo empty_merge 1>&2
